AuthorDetails.Name: Digital Wonderlab
AuthorDetails.Description: As a proud Certified B Corporation®, we are passionate about amplifying the voices and visions of purpose-driven start-ups, SMEs, not-for-profits, and global enterprises.

Description: Accessibility Toolkit adds page-level and site-level WCAG accessibility auditing to Umbraco backoffice: 37 checks (A/AA/AAA), scored results, visual contrast checks with preview snippets, history, and export-ready reports.
Title: Accessibility Toolkit
